description:
Investigate non-linear age effects on Conscientiousness using the BFI25 dataset (/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv). Calculate a Conscientiousness score (C_Score) as the mean of items C1 through C5 and an age-squared variable (Age_Sq). Conduct a hierarchical linear regression with C_Score as the dependent variable, entering Age in the first block and Age_Sq in the second block. Save the analysis as /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Conscientiousness_NonLinear.omv and record the R² change and p-value for the model comparison in /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/nonlinear_results.txt using the following format:

R2_Change: [value]
p_value: [value]
